name: Twitter / X API
description: Twitter (now X) is a social media platform for posting short-form content called tweets. The v2 API lets you create and delete tweets, search recent tweets, retrieve user profiles, manage lists, get followers, and access bookmarks.

capabilities.name: tweets_create
capabilities.description: Post a new tweet to the authenticated user timeline.

capabilities.name: tweets_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single tweet by ID with metrics and author info.

capabilities.name: tweets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a tweet posted by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: tweets_search
capabilities.description: Search recent tweets (last 7 days) using query operators.

capabilities.name: tweets_lookup
capabilities.description: Look up multiple tweets by their IDs.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Look up a user profile by username.

capabilities.name: users_get_by_id
capabilities.description: Look up a user profile by user ID.

capabilities.name: users_tweets_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve tweets posted by a specific user.

capabilities.name: users_followers_list
capabilities.description: List the followers of a specific user.

capabilities.name: users_following_list
capabilities.description: List users that a specific user is following.

capabilities.name: bookmarks_list
capabilities.description: List bookmarked tweets for the authenticated user.
